title: alopecurus borealis subsp. glaucus
intro: Alopecurus borealis subsp. glaucus, also known as blue-joint grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Blue-joint grass can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
